arts.ttl: Ibrahimovic’s Vision Shapes Camarda’s Future at Milan
arts.sum: In an unexpected turn of events, AC Milan's young prodigy Francesco Camarda will remain with the Rossoneri, despite a nearly finalized loan deal with Monza. This decision, influenced heavily by Zlatan Ibrahimovic, now a key figure in Milan's management, marks a significant shift in the club's approach to nurturing young talent. arts.ttl: Coppa Italia | Milan v Roma: Match Preview
arts.sum: In a highly anticipated Coppa Italia quarter-final clash, AC Milan will host Roma at the iconic San Siro on Wednesday evening. Both teams, currently struggling in Serie A, view this cup tie as a golden opportunity to salvage their seasons and keep their hopes of domestic silverware alive. arts.ttl: Joao Felix signs for AC Milan on loan from Chelsea - as he joins Kyle Walker and Co just six months after penning a SEVEN-year contract with the Blues
arts.sum: It has been an underwhelming second spell in west London for Felix, who since his £46million move in August has largely been limited to substitute appearances in the Premier League.
